headline: Textron Inc. (TXT) Strengthens H‑1 Fleet Through Structural and Power Enhancements
summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is one of the best gun stocks to buy in 2026. On March 17, Bell Textron Inc., a subsidiary of Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT), announced the completion of the first AH‑1Z and UH‑1Y aircraft upgraded under the US Marine Corps’ SPINE program. Formerly known as SIEPU, the program focuses on strengthening aircraft structures […]
